content_of_post_to_comment:
{Oh quick one I just realised the account name but I ended up getting banned on my old account for promoting my app too much)

Okay this is very cringe sorry 😭

But looking at my profile I found my first ever reddit post which was my venting, To be honest I had mental health issues and suffered with extreme loneliness like I would get left out by friends family cousins like it felt as if every time I tried to get close hang out or make plan everyone would push me away.

I mean at the time I was trying to start a business and was constantly failing which impacted my mental health even more.

As you can see in the reddit post I had a really strong crush on this one girl. And I wanna say that I am 100% over her and done I am now living happy still lonely but it's okay I am at peace with myself I have gotten much closer to god and talk to him I started working out I don't think about her anymore or let her dictate me. I have started my own software company and am launching my own mobile app in literally 7 days, I have 10 influencers ready to promote it. I finished GCSE'S and everything has been going great.

I never knew I would change this much like if I talked to myself back then I would not recognise myself. Like I was at such a low point crying over this girl, stomach hurting eyes hurting etc , at rock bottom to climbing my way out.

Damn I guess I wanna say to everyone keep going, never give up it is you against you all that matters is if you beat yourself. And if you are chasing something and it is hard or it takes time that means it is more worth chasing because 99% of people are not willing to chase it.....
